purpose: EXIF orientation test corpus (ADR-0003 orphan-gate; CONTEXT.md deceptively-simple row 'EXIF orientation'). The display-master projection must normalize all 8 orientations. Gate: 8-orientation set passes before the first phone-photo public exhibit.
consumerStatus: WIRED for headless reader+mapping (src/exif/read.test.ts asserts all 8 against this spec, both byte orders + APP0-before-APP1 + edge cases); pixel-bearing exif-1.jpg..exif-8.jpg still owed for the browser BAKE verify (canvas/createImageBitmap can't run headless). Reader = readExifOrientation (src/exif/read.ts); bake = apps/studio/src/bake.ts wired into addObjectFromFile.
note: Orientations 5 and 7 (transpose/transverse) are the ones 'nobody tests' — they MUST be in the corpus. Orientation 1 is a no-op. Source images preserved untouched (provenance); a normalized display-master derivative is generated; annotations target the master (zero orientation-awareness in the coord layer).
fixtureFilesOwed: exif-1.jpg .. exif-8.jpg — a 4x2 image whose top-left pixel encodes orientation, tagged with each EXIF value. Generated when the EXIF normalize code lands (requires image-encode tooling not run in Phase 0). For axis-swapping orientations (5,6,7,8) the source stored dimensions are 2x4 and normalize to 4x2.
